title: Summarize Subitem level(Task) workload at Item level (project)
excerpt: We have recently set up monday.com to track projects and tasks. We use Item for Projects and Sub item for tasks under the project. The task has timeline and effort. I want to be able to view effort % for each task owner …

posts.author: ashishkra (Ashish)
posts.cookedHtml: We have recently set up monday.com to track projects and tasks. We use Item for Projects and Sub item for tasks under the project. The task has timeline and effort. I want to be able to view effort % for each task owner by project. Workload either works at subitem level or item level. How can we summarize at project(item) level?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Ashish,

Is this what you’re looking to achieve?

Let me know!
